package rulecoverage

func PositiveMutexValueReceiver() string {
    ruleID := "mutex_value_receiver"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "warning"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "`func (s MyStruct) Method()` where `MyStruct` contains a `sync.Mutex` or `sync.RWMutex` field"
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
